name: storytellers-design
task: ui ux review, figure out what design piece to work on next
playbook_description: Review or plan UI/UX with design-system, accessibility, responsive layout, and polish checks.

alternates.description: Review a pull request for bugs, regressions, security, and missing tests.

workflow.output: UI/UX plan or review with concrete fixes and verification checks
workflow.validation: inspect small and large viewports, keyboard/touch states, contrast, reduced motion, and layout stability
workflow.recovery: if the target UI is unclear, ask for page/component path and screenshots before edits

routing_facts: plan: Active Milestone: M024: Complete Clean Story Workspace Conformance (roadmap: `.gsd/milestones/M024/ROADMAP.md`)

steps.reason: Review design-system, layout, and interaction quality.
Review contrast, input, motion, and assistive states.

skills.name: ponytail
skills.summary: laziest correct solution; the reuse ladder (reuse > stdlib > native > installed > one line > minimum)

skills.name: impeccable
skills.summary: quality gate against AI slop; clean reusable components; YAGNI/DRY/KISS

skills.name: ui-ux-pro-max
skills.summary: visual polish, layout quality, typography, interaction design

skills.name: frontend-design
skills.summary: frontend layout, component composition, responsive design

skills.name: accessibility
skills.summary: a11y audits, semantic HTML, contrast, keyboard/screen-reader support

skills.name: web-quality-audit
skills.summary: runtime web quality, performance, Core Web Vitals

skills.summary: Review UI code for Web Interface Guidelines: accessibility, UX, design compliance
